chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يَتَزَوَّجُ أَوْ يُزَوِّجُ وَ يُطَلِّقُ وَ يَشْتَرِي الْجَوَارِيَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 102 – The one in Ihraam gets married, or marries and divorces, and he buys the slave girl

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/346)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/346)
text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمُحْرِمِ يُطَلِّقُ قَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Hammad Bin Usman,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I asked himasws about the one in Ihraam, ‘Can he divorce?’ Heasws said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Hammad ibn ‘Uthaman who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who is in the state of Ihram; if he can divorce. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, he can pronounce divorce.’”
